name: WoW Guild Automation
author: Domekologe
description: Onboarding, verification and rank sync for WoW guild Discord servers.
end_user_data_statement: Stores per-guild WoW/API and Discord role settings; per-member linked character names, mains, onboarding language, registrations, and ready-times. Bot-owner global config holds Blizzard API client id/secret. Member data is cleared when a user leaves the guild or when admins remove it.
install_msg:
WoW Guild Automation loaded. Configure roles, channels and onboarding via the web dashboard.

This cog interacts with outside services (Discord OAuth2 and the Blizzard/Battle.net API) for member verification.
